subcodes.first_line: ...Consider how the signs of the Tablet which was revealed to you on Sept. 1, 1901, have become apparent and manifest.  At that time the hurricane of the violation of the Covenant had been extinguished
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
